chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.D-22 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of MA 531/23 3.For hearing of main case 15-06-2023 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for the applicants. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G for the State. ***** The issue in these proceedings appears to be that the police recommended that the applicants may be discharged in Crime No.104 of 2022, registered at P.S, Pirjogoth under Sections 387, 384, 324, 337H, 504, PPC & 7 ATA. It also appears that the applicants were admitted to pre-arrest somewhere in October, 2022. Learned trial Judge did not accept the recommendations of the police and took cognizance against the applicants. Mr. Khoso argues that while they will approach the trial Court for his remedy for quashment of proceedings, his concern is while taking cognizance, the trial Court issued NBWs against the applicants. Mr. Khoso further submits that the applicants, who were already on bail, intend and want to surrender before the trial Court. In view of foregoing, operation of NBWs issued against the applicants is suspended. The applicants shall appear before the trial Court on the next date of hearing, which is 17.06.2023. In the event, the applicants do not appear before the trial Court on the next date of hearing, learned trial Court may then issue NBWs against them. Instant Crl. Misc. Application stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
